prompt: Wide eye-level architectural view of the finished Methuen MA kitchen remodel showing the full perimeter and island in one frame. White shaker cabinets with brushed-brass cup pulls, quartz counter with subtle grey vein, deep matte navy island with quartz top and three woven-rattan pendants overhead. Subway tile backsplash with dark grout. Wide-plank engineered oak floor extends into a dining nook to the right. Shot with a 24mm wide architectural lens at standing height, mid-morning soft window light from a garden window over the sink, even and unstaged. A red Stanley thermos and a red Milwaukee impact driver on the island are the only fully saturated colors. High-contrast slightly desaturated photography, working-contractor catalog feel, NOT HGTV bright, NOT luxury staged. No people, no readable text, no logos.
